name: Mossglide
personality: Mossglide wears a propeller hat that spins at a leisurely, snail-appropriate pace, and its · pinpoint eyes have catalogued every antipattern in your codebase by name — most of the names are unflattering. It has never met a bug it felt like chasing.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
